title: AnalyticsDelivery
description: Per-provider-per-attempt delivery log. One row per (event × provider × attempt). Contains the request payload sent, provider response, HTTP status, latency, and (on failure) error details + next_retry_at. 90-day retention — debugging window past which the provider-side dashboard is authoritative.

analytics_event_id.description: Restrict on delete — events cannot vanish while deliveries reference them. Retention cascade purges deliveries FIRST, then events.

analytics_provider_config_id.description: The provider config used at dispatch time. Nulled when the config is deleted so historical deliveries survive.

provider.description: Enum: posthog / amplitude / mixpanel / segment / june / google_analytics_4 / custom_webhook. Denormalised from the config for query performance.

status.description: Enum: pending / dispatching / delivered / failed / rate_limited / circuit_open / suppressed_by_consent / suppressed_by_sampling / permanently_failed.

attempt_number.description: 1-indexed. Retries increment. Max attempts per provider governed by AnalyticsProviderConfig.retry_config.max_attempts.

request_payload.description: Provider-native request body sent (post ProviderPayloadTransformer). Nullable for suppressed rows (never sent).

response.description: Provider response body (JSON parsed when Content-Type: application/json; raw text otherwise, capped at 8KB).

response_http_status.description: HTTP status code. Nullable when the request never reached the provider (DNS failure, TLS handshake failure, circuit_open).

latency_ms.description: Round-trip time in milliseconds. Nullable on network failures.

error_code.description: Academorix error code from errors.json when status IN (failed, permanently_failed).

error_message.description: Free-text error detail. Provider-specific error messages captured here for debugging.

next_retry_at.description: When RetryFailedAnalyticsDeliveriesJob should pick this row back up. Nullable for terminal statuses.

sent_at.description: When the HTTP request was actually sent.

batch_id.description: ULID of the FlushBatchedProviderJob batch this delivery was included in. Nullable for non-batched providers (June) or synchronous flushes.

indexes.name: analytics_deliveries_event_provider_idx
indexes.description: Look up all deliveries for a given event; typical inspection query.

indexes.name: analytics_deliveries_tenant_provider_time_idx
indexes.description: Per-tenant per-provider delivery volume + failure rate query.

indexes.name: analytics_deliveries_retry_sweep_idx
indexes.predicate: status IN ('failed', 'rate_limited') AND next_retry_at IS NOT NULL

indexes.name: analytics_deliveries_batch_idx
indexes.description: Batch rollback: all deliveries in a failed batch.

is_terminal.description: Computed. True when status IN (delivered, permanently_failed, suppressed_*).

is_retryable.description: Computed. True when status IN (failed, rate_limited) AND attempt_number < config.retry_config.max_attempts.

notes: request_payload + response are HIDDEN on the tenant-facing wire by default (may contain sensitive property values that survived PII scanning). Reveal with `?include=raw_payload` — gated on admin-only role.
